calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph Quinn, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Alexander T. Jones, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, FRANK LAZZARO.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WILLIAM PEAVEY, AV RENTALS LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Frank Lazzaro sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $33,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,575.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $740.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,215.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Sep-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
